programmes.show_description: Political analysis with Natalie Higgins and Phil Sim.
Joining Radio 5 Live.
News from across Scotland and the world, plus sport, weather, entertainment and big name interviews.
Stephen Jardine gets to the heart of the stories making the news.
News updates from Scotland and beyond, plus all your lunchtime sport, travel and weather.
Des Clarke hosts Scotland's award-winning satirical news quiz.
Nicola Meighan brings you feel-good music and chat with celebrity guests.
Breaking down the day's talking points with comment and opinion, plus sport, travel and weather.
Roddy Hart, presenter of Quay Sessions and Mixtape, shares his favourite vinyl record. The top ten albums this week in 1989, and Grant celebrates a big birthday for Lisa Stansfield.
With Brontës' debut album on the way they're tonight's featured artist, find out all about them along with the best new music coming out of Scotland. WhatsApp 08085 92 95 00.
The best company to end the day, with lively chat and some of your favourite tunes.
Joining Radio 5 Live.
Mark Stephen and Rachel Stewart with stories from the great outdoors.
News from across Scotland and the world, plus sport, weather, entertainment and big name interviews.
Maisie Adam, Caroline Weir and Mark Nelson chat to Amy Irons and Steven Mill as they kick-off the weekend with lots of laughs, great guests and timeless tunes.
The most petty and ill-informed football show on radio.
Comprehensive coverage of Scottish sport, including live and exclusive commentary.
Debating the big talking points across Scottish football following today's action as the fans get their say.
For the very best in traditional music, join Gary Innes for Take the Floor. We share with you once again the fantastic debut session from Rory Matheson and his Scottish Dance Band.
Mìcheal Steele with a selection of the best in pipe music. This week, he features sets recorded at the 2026 Donald MacLeod Memorial Competition.
Roddy Hart with a mix of classic tracks and new discoveries.
